<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Forecasting Statistics (TES)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/forecastStats/tes"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Optimize Triple Exponential Smoothing (TES) model parameters for given dataset. Returns the best-fit parameters and their corresponding Root Mean Square Error (RMSE).

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"alpha":{"type":"number","format":"double"},"beta":{"type":"number","format":"double"},"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"number","format":"double"}},"frequency":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"gamma":{"type":"number","format":"double"},"level":{"type":"number","format":"double"},"n":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"optimize":{"type":"boolean"},"start":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"TesInputDTO"}}},"description":"The input data for the TES optimization","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"string"}}},"description":"Returns the best-fit parameters and their corresponding Root Mean Square Error (RMSE)"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while parsing the input data"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
